name: RFG Holdings Limited
summary: RFG Holdings Limited manufactures and markets convenience meal solutions in South Africa and the Kingdom of Eswatini. The company operates through Regional and International segments. It offers canned fruits, jams, vegetables, meat products, fruit juices, fruit purees and concentrates, dry packed foods, fresh and frozen ready meals, pies, pastries, bakery, salads, canned pineapple, tomato paste, canned tomatoes, vegetable puree, citrus fruit products, custards, spices, and gravy and cook-in sauces. In addition, the company provides jelly, crispy coatings, vegetable protein, curries, breyanis, soya, infant meals, and dairy products, as well as a range of food/household ingredients. It provides its products under the Rhodes, Bull Brand, Bisto, Hinds, Pakco, Hazeldene, Woza Woza, Buffalo, Magpie, Gold Dish, Wilde, Zing, Trout Hall, Trotters, Southern Coating, Wild Fruit Juice, and Rhodes Squish brands. The company was formerly known as Rhodes Food Group Holdings Limited and changed its name to RFG Holdings Limited in April 2020. RFG Holdings Limited was founded in 1897 and is headquartered in Cape Town, South Africa.
